name: Imported list: normalize, dedupe, enrich
description: M4 Workflow 3: import a CSV of companies/contacts (CLI --import-csv, UI paste, or MCP importCsv), normalize domains and phones, dedupe against existing leads, optionally research websites and enrich decision-makers for call_ready/full profiles, score completeness, review, export. quick_list cleans and dedupes the list at zero cost.
